overall.description: Gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima depicting a samurai warrior resting at a secluded mountain hot spring surrounded by autumn maple trees, soaking in the thermal waters, then ascending a grassy hillside to a dramatic cliff overlook with expansive views of the forested valley under stormy skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain hot spring with stone lantern and red maple trees

events.description: camera shifts to low angle view with golden sun backlighting through red maple leaves

agents.ego_description: sitting in the hot spring pool, then standing contemplatively beneath a red maple tree as crimson leaves fall around him

entered.detail: traditional Japanese stone lantern with curved roof beside the hot spring pool
milky blue thermal water pool surrounded by rocks
large maple tree with vibrant crimson leaves backlit by the sun
simple wooden fence marking the edge of the hot spring area
distant mountain silhouette against the stormy sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a secluded mountain hot spring where the samurai sits in the milky waters near a stone lantern. The camera then shifts to a low angle beneath a magnificent red maple tree, with golden sunlight filtering through the crimson leaves as they fall gently around the standing warrior.

scene_state.functional_zone: natural hot spring pool surrounded by rocks and grass

events.description: character falls backward into the hot spring pool creating a large splash
character climbs out of the pool and continues walking up the grassy slope

agents.ego_description: walking toward the hot spring through grass and rocks, wading into the milky water, floating briefly with arms outstretched, then climbing out onto the rocks to continue the journey

entered.detail: traditional bamboo water spout at the edge of the hot spring pool
large boulders surrounding the hot spring pool

segments.scene_description: The character walks through grass and rocks toward the hot spring pool, passing beneath the red maple tree. He enters the milky water, floats momentarily, then climbs out and continues up the grassy hillside away from the pool area.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy mountain trail leading to cliff overlook with panoramic valley views

events.description: character stops at the cliff edge to survey the expansive forested valley below
sun breaks through the storm clouds creating dramatic backlighting and god rays
character turns and walks along the cliff edge toward a higher vantage point

agents.ego_description: ascending a steep grassy slope to a rocky cliff overlook, pausing to gaze at the vast forested valley and distant mountains, then walking along the cliff edge as the wind blows through the grass

entered.detail: large gray rock outcrop at the cliff edge providing a vantage point
expansive green forest canopy stretching to the horizon
panoramic view of the valley with misty mountains in the distance
dark dramatic storm clouds covering the sky with patches of light breaking through

segments.scene_description: The character climbs a grassy hillside to a dramatic cliff overlook, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of the vast forested valley below. He stands on the rocky outcrop as the sun breaks through the storm clouds, casting dramatic light across the landscape, before walking along the cliff edge to survey the terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the intimate serenity of a secluded mountain hot spring to the expansive grandeur of a storm-swept cliff overlook. It begins with the samurai resting in milky thermal waters beside a stone lantern, before the perspective shifts to a low angle beneath a magnificent red maple tree where golden sunlight filters through falling crimson leaves. As the warrior leaves the pool and traverses the rocky terrain, the camera tracks his ascent up a grassy hillside, moving away from the sheltered spring. The scene then opens into a breathtaking panoramic view of a vast forested valley as the character reaches a rocky outcrop. Finally, the lighting shifts dramatically as the sun breaks through storm clouds, casting light across the landscape while the samurai walks along the cliff edge to survey the terrain below.
